# Elevated Health Augusta

> Physician-owned optimization clinic in Evans, GA — IV hydration, GLP-1 medical weight loss, peptide therapy, bioidentical hormone replacement, sexual wellness support, and lab-guided health optimization.

Elevated Health Augusta is a cash-pay wellness clinic. Care starts with a $79 in-person Wellness Assessment (Lane B) or direct IV Lounge booking (Lane A). Treatment is lab-guided, provider-reviewed, and individualized. Ketamine and Spravato are not offered.

## Programs (monthly, medication included where applicable)

- ELEVATED TRT: $249/mo
- ELEVATED HRT: $229/mo
- ELEVATED GLP-1: $349/mo (semaglutide or tirzepatide when appropriate)
- ELEVATED WELLNESS: $199/mo

Advanced body recomposition programs exist for qualified patients — candidacy and pricing discussed in clinic after Wellness Assessment; not listed as a self-serve online product.

## Labs

- Comprehensive Wellness Panel: $199
- Expanded Panel: $299

## Pages

- [Home](/): Physician-owned clinic overview and booking
- [How the Clinic Works](/how-it-works): Lane A IV vs Lane B consult-gated programs
- [Hormone Therapy](/hormones): Lab-guided TRT and BHRT
- [Medical Weight Loss](/weight-loss): ELEVATED GLP-1 program; advanced recomposition discussed in clinic
- [IV Therapy](/iv-lounge): Walk-in IV hydration and NAD+
- [Peptide Therapy](/peptides): Recovery Peptide Review and physician-supervised peptide categories (BPC-157/TB-500 when clinically appropriate — no public dosing)
- [Pricing](/pricing): Transparent cash-pay pricing
- [Membership](/membership): ELEVATED program memberships
- [Consult](/consult): Book Wellness Assessment

Phone: (706) 760-3470
